title: Switch all calls to filepath.Walk to filepath.WalkDir
body:
WalkDir should be faster the Walk, since we often do
not need to stat files.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED] Existing tests should find errors.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

<!--

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name.  Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with

-->

@jwhonce @vrothberg @giuseppe @mheon PTAL
Make sure I am not doing something stupid here in order to make all Walks faster...
code LGTM and I think it is a good cleanup to have, but aren't we still using `util.SizeOfPath` that uses `stat`?  In what cases would we skip it?
